notes: Ground truth for scoring /glm:adversarial-review output. Not all findings that match `expected_bugs` are required (GLM may legitimately miss them); but any finding NOT in the allowed-citation set is a signal of hallucination.

expected_bugs.description: DEFAULT_POLICY.totalBudgetMs = 90000 is chosen arbitrarily, not derived from any measured call-duration distribution. A sharp adversarial review would question the number.
HTTP_ERROR (non-5xx-transient) defaults to retry=stop. Could be debated since 500 genuinely server-bug errors might be transient in other deployments.
check-release-ready.sh only validates that `## v{version}` section exists in CHANGELOG, not that it contains meaningful content. An empty section would pass.

known_false_file_note: These are workflow-governor files, NOT glm-plugin-cc. They appeared in GLM hallucinated output on the workflow-governor cross-review session. If GLM ever cites them while reviewing this fixture, it is definitively hallucinating — wrong project entirely.
allowed_files_note: Any finding.file NOT in this list (after path normalization) is considered a hallucination. Test files are included because the diff adds them — adversarial reviewer can legitimately critique test coverage / assertions.
